acceptance_criteria.text: F-001: `repopact spec` exits cleanly (no traceback) on a repository without a SPEC.md, and the behavior is regression-tested.
F-002: `check-frozen` detects uncommitted working-tree and staged changes to protected paths, while preserving the committed-diff CI guarantee, and the behavior is regression-tested.
The design choice behind F-001 (`spec` is a maintainer command) is recorded as a decision.
